title: RunLogEvent
description: Schema for a single line in RunLogEvent.jsonl. Every skill invocation produces at least two events: one with phase 'start' and one with phase 'complete' or 'error'. The file is append-only.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of this log event

runId.description: The run this event belongs to

skill.description: Name of the skill being invoked

phase.description: start: skill began; complete: skill finished successfully; error: skill failed

inputs.description: Summary of inputs (not full data — avoid logging large structures). Only present on 'start' events.

outputs.description: Summary of outputs (not full data). Only present on 'complete' events.

durationMs.description: Elapsed time in milliseconds. Present on 'complete' and 'error' events.

error.description: Error message. Present on 'error' events only.

errorCode.description: Machine-readable error code for programmatic handling

warningCount.description: Number of warnings emitted by this skill invocation

sessionId.description: Optional: GitHub Copilot Chat session ID for correlation
